Just because the fire keeps going with stuff, it does not mean it must stop without stuff. Maybe it goes on for a short time. english_query: how to build fair rules if you did not know your place in the world
ugf_response:
First, the first idea is that we should make ways for how people live together as if we do not know who we will be when the ways are set. This means we do not know if we will have much or if we will have little, or if we will be strong or if we will be not strong, or if we will be the ones in power or the ones who must follow the power. We must act as if we are standing behind a wall where we cannot see our own place in the world.

Second, the second idea is what follows from this way of thinking. If we do not know our place, we will want to make ways that are good for every person, no matter where they end up. We will not make a way that helps the ones with much hurt the ones with little, because we might end up with little. We will not make a way that lets the strong take things from those who are not strong, because we might end up being not strong. The thinking is that this way of making ways will lead to a way of life that is good to every person.

Third, the third idea is to look at whether this way of thinking is good. This way of thinking is strong because it stops people from only wanting what is good for themselves when they make the ways. It makes us look at what is good for the whole group instead of just what is good for us. However, some might say it is hard to not know who we are or what we want. It is also hard to know if a way that is good for everyone is the same as a way that is the best for a person in a very hard spot. Still, it is a very good way to try to find what is right for all people.

english_query: If the enemy attacks despite the commitment—because of misperception, irrationality, or a sudden change in their payoff structure—Mira's army is trapped with no escape, leading to catastrophic loss. Commitment devices backfire when the opponent does not respond as predicted.
ugf_response: First, we look at the idea that saying you will not run away can help you win. This works if the other side sees your plan and decides to stop. But the question asks what happens if they do not stop. If the other side sees things wrong, or if they are not thinking right, or if what they want changes fast, they might attack anyway. If this happens, the person who said they would not run is now stuck. They cannot go away because they said they would stay. This means they get hurt very bad. So, the plan to show you will stay has a big chance of going wrong. It only works if the other side acts in a way you guess. If they do not, the plan fails and causes great pain. Someone might say that showing you are strong is always good because it scares people. But fear does not always stop what people do. Sometimes fear makes people act wild. Also, if the other side does not know what you think, they might guess wrong. So, the plan is not safe. It needs the other side to be calm and think well. If they are not, the person who stayed put loses everything they have. Plans that lock you in are bad because they leave no way out if the other side does not act as you guess, leading to losing everything.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
Before you do something, you must stop and think about what the other person will do when they see what you do. This is a way to see into the future by using what you know about how people work.

First, you must look at what you want to do. You must see your own plan clearly. Second, you must imagine that you are the other person. You must look at the world through their eyes. You must think about what they know and what they do not know. You must think about what they want and what they fear.

Third, you must ask yourself what they will think when they see your move. If you do the first thing, how will they feel? Will they feel happy or will they feel angry? If they feel angry, what will they do next? Will they fight you or will they walk away?

The thing after the third thing is this. You must think about their next move. If they fight you, what will you do then? If they walk away, how does that change your plan? You must keep doing this in your head. You see your move, then you see their move, then you see your next move after that. You keep going back and back in your mind like a game.

The thing after the thing after the third thing is this. You must look for the best way to win or the best way to stay safe. You do not just pick a move because it feels good right now. You pick a move because you have seen the many steps that come after it. You choose the path where the things that happen next are good for you.

By doing this, you are not just acting. You are seeing the whole story before it even starts. You are using your mind to see the many ways the story could go, so you are not surprised when things happen.

english_query: It looks like love is not in god. Because there are no strong feelings in god. But love is a strong feeling. So love is not in god.
ugf_response: The part of us that wants things moves the body, and this move often changes our body, like in the heart. We call these body-changing moves 'strong feelings'. But the part of us that chooses what is good does not always change the body. Love can be a move of this choosing part. When love is just a choice of the good mind, it is not a strong feeling. It is in this way that god loves, without any strong feeling.

english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
Most people feel things in a way that is not even. If you find ten pieces of gold on the ground, you will feel good. If you lose ten pieces of gold from your pocket, you will feel very bad. But the way you feel is not the same. The bad feeling from losing the gold is much bigger than the good feeling from finding it. This is a thing that happens to many people in many ways.

To understand this, we must look at how our minds work. We want to stay safe. In the old days, when people lived in the wild, losing something important like food or a home could mean death. Finding extra food was good, but losing the food you already had was much more bad. Our minds grew to pay more attention to things that could hurt us. This helps us stay alive.

We can see this by looking at how people make choices. Imagine two paths. On the first path, you might win some good things. On the second path, you might lose some good things. Most people will choose to stay where they are if the chance of losing is there, even if the chance of winning is the same size. The fear of the thing being gone is a heavy weight that pulls harder than the hope of the win.

Think about it this way. If you have a box of ten eggs and you drop it, you feel a great pain in your heart. If someone gives you a box of ten eggs, you feel good, but the good feeling is not as strong as the pain you felt when you broke your own eggs. The thing being gone feels like it takes something away from who you are. The win feels like it is just something extra. Because of this, we often act in ways that keep us from losing, even when those ways stop us from getting much more.

english_query: University presents {citation impact increase} and hides {citation rings, retractions, inflated metrics}.
ugf_response: First, we look at what the school shows. It says people use their work more. This looks good. Then, we see what they hide. They hide groups of people who only read each other to make numbers go up. They hide when they had to take back work because it was wrong. They hide how they made the numbers seem bigger than they are. If a place hides bad things and only shows good things, it is not open. It is like a shop showing a good red round food but hiding the bad ones. We might think they just want to look good. But hiding how they got the numbers changes how we see them. If we knew they used bad ways to get high numbers, we would not trust them. So, the main idea is that they want us to believe they are better than they are. They do not tell the whole story. This makes their good news less real because we know they hide the bad news. The school is not open with the truth. They try to make us believe they are better by hiding bad parts, so we should not trust them.

english_query: The court sage is teaching the apprentice how SPE refines Nash equilibrium by removing non‑credible threats.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea about how people act in a game. This idea says that no one wants to change their plan if the other person stays the same. But this idea has a problem. It lets people say they will do something bad to hurt the other person, even if they would not really do it. This is a promise that is not real. For one case, a person might say, 'If you do not give me money, I will burn down my own house.' The other person knows this is not good for the first person, so the promise is not real. Then, we look at the second idea. The better way fixes this. It asks us to look at every small part of the game. It checks if the plan makes sense at every step, not just at the start. If a promise does not make sense for the person making it at that moment, the better way says it will not happen. So, the better way removes the empty words. Someone might say the first way is enough because people might be wild or forced. But in most normal cases, people want to help themselves. So, the empty words go away. The better way is a true way to guess what will really happen because it only keeps the plans that make sense all the way through. It cuts out the noise of empty words. The better way makes the first idea true by throwing away plans that use promises people would not actually keep. It keeps only the choices that make sense at every step of the game.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
Imagine a person tells a story to a group of people. Later, that same person tells the story to someone else, but the story is not the same. The words are different. The things that happened are changed. This can happen when someone wants to make themselves look good or when they want to make another person look bad. It can also happen when someone forgets what they said because their mind is not clear.

The hard question is how we can know if a person is telling the truth about what was said before. How can we know if they are changing the words with a plan to make us believe something that is not true? This is hard because we cannot go back in time to hear the first story again. We only have what the person tells us now.

Some people might say that we should only believe what we see with our own eyes and ears. If we did not hear the first story, we should not believe the second story. They think that if we did not see it, we cannot know if it is true. This way of thinking keeps us safe from being made to believe a lie, but it also means we might miss things that are true.

Other people might look at the person telling the story. They might look at how the person acts. If the person looks like they are not telling the truth, or if they always tell stories that make them look like a great and good person, then these people will not believe them. They use what they know about the person to make a guess. This can be good, but it can also be bad if we decide we do not like a person and then we think everything they say is a lie, even when they are telling the truth.

There are also people who look at all the stories together. If many people tell the same story, then it is probably true. If one person tells a story that is very different from what everyone else says, then that person might be changing what happened. This way of thinking uses many voices to find the truth. But sometimes, a group of people can all be wrong together, and the one person who is different might actually be the one telling the truth.

english_query: Also, the great old church teacher says the mind does not end because it can know what is true. But what is true does not end and has no start. So the part of the soul and the sky spirit that knows things does not end and also has no start.
ugf_response: Sky spirits and able to think well souls do not end because they have a way of being that lets them know what is true. But they did not have this way of being from the very first; it was given to them when God wanted it. So it is not true that sky spirits were there from the very first.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response:
When you want to know the whole truth about what happened to a person, you must look for things that are not seen at first. Most people only tell you what they want you to know. They might hide things because they are afraid or because they want to look good. To find the things they hide, you must act like a person who looks for small marks on the ground to see where an animal went.

First, you must listen to what the person says and then look for what they do not say. If a person tells a story about a bad thing that happened, look for the parts that do not fit together. If the story changes every time they tell it, there is a hidden part. You should ask them to tell the story again but change the order of the things that happened. If they cannot do this without doing things that are not right, they might be hiding something.

Second, you must look at the things around them. If a person says they were in one place, but the things they have with them show they were in a different place, you have found a hidden part. You must look at the things that people leave behind. These things do not lie like people do.

Third, you must look at how the person feels when you ask certain things. If you ask a question and the person becomes very angry or very quiet, that is a sign. The part of the story that makes them feel this way is the part that is probably what they are trying to keep hidden. You must go slowly and be very kind. If you are too hard, they will close their hearts and you will find nothing.

Finally, you must put all these small pieces together. You take the things they said, the things they did, and the things they felt. When you put them all together, the shape of the truth will start to show itself. The truth is often like a picture that is covered by a piece of soft thing used to hide things. You cannot see it all at once, but by pulling that thing away bit by bit, you will see what was there all along.

ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the small thing that makes the green growing thing gets wet, then the green growing thing gets bigger. Next, we look at the second idea. It says if the green growing thing gets bigger, then the flying thing has soft parts on its body. We put these two ideas together. If the small thing gets wet, the green growing thing gets bigger. If the green growing thing gets bigger, the flying thing has soft parts. So, if the small thing gets wet, the flying thing has soft parts. The last idea says exactly this. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: Also, whatever is known is known by some doing. If the part of us that thinks knows its own doing, it knows it by some doing, and again it knows that doing by some other doing; this goes on forever, which seems not possible.
ugf_response: The work of the part of us that thinks is not the same as the thing it looks at. Just as a thing and its good part are seen by one look, the work of the part of us that thinks and the thing are not seen by one look. english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
First, watch the other person. Look at what they say, how they move, and what they have done before. From that you can make a guess about what they will try next. When you have a guess, think about your own plan. Ask yourself: if the other person does the thing I guess, will my plan still work? If it does not, you can change your plan before you act.

Second, try to see if your guess might be wrong. To do that, think of another guess that is not the same. Ask yourself how your plan would work if that other guess were true. If your plan works for both guesses, you are in a safer place. If it only works for one guess, you may want to pick a plan that works for the other guess too, or you may want to wait and see more before you act.

Third, when you feel you have a good guess and a plan that works for the things the other person might do most probably, you can act. After you act, keep watching. The other person may do something you did not think of, and then you can make a new guess and a new plan. This way you keep moving forward while trying to stay one step ahead of what the other person might do.

Because the second idea is not true the first idea cannot be true. So the first idea must be not true. The first idea being not true means the book is not on the place. So the last line is true. follows

But a single being is found in things that do not move, like god and the spirits. And as the shape finishes what a thing really is, what a thing really is, shown by the saying, is often called by this word. And here it is used in that way. So another teacher says it is the special mark that gives the shape to each thing, because this mark finishes the saying and comes from the special shape. So in the saying of a single being, which is one thing in a set kind, it is better to use this word than what a thing really is, because the last one comes from being, which is the word used for most things.

english_query: how people make deals when they will see each other again
ugf_response: First, we think about two people who meet to talk about giving and taking. They know they will see each other again soon. This is different from when they meet a stranger and will never see that person again. When they know they will meet again, they care about what the other person thinks of them. If one person tries to take more than is right, the other person may be mad. This mad feeling can make the next time they meet very hard. So, the first person might choose to be kind and give what is right now. This is because being kind now helps them get good things later. The hard question is how to fit what you want right now with what you want in the future. Some people say you should always be nice. They think this builds trust. Trust makes life easier for everyone. Other people say you should watch out for yourself. They think if you are too nice, the other person might use you for their own good. They say you must be ready to stop talking with someone if they are not right. This way, you keep yourself safe. Most people find a way in the middle. They try to be right but also keep an eye on what the other person does. If the other person is good, they stay good. If the other person is bad, they change their plan. This shows that knowing you will see someone again changes how you act. It makes people think about the long run, not just the short run.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
The first idea says that there are real times when putting all you have learned out there can cause trouble. It is true that when you tell everything, other people can use that stuff in ways that hurt you, make you feel not safe, or spread the word to people who might not need it. It is also true that some things you have learned can cause worry or fear if they are heard by those who are not ready for them. In short, the idea that sharing all you have learned is not always the best move fits with what we see most days.

The second idea takes the first idea and says that because of those possible hurts, you should keep some things to yourself. It says that the right move is to think about who will hear, why they will hear, and what they might do with the word before you speak. It also says that keeping back some of the things you have learned can keep you safe, keep others from hurt, and keep the even feel in a group. The thought that you need to choose what to share, instead of always sharing everything, follows the first idea.

The third part looks at whether the thinking behind the second idea is good. The thinking is good when it makes you stop and ask if the other person needs the word, if the word could cause hurt, or if the word could be used in a bad way. In those cases, the care shown is a good way to keep safe and keep trust. The thinking can be less good when it turns into a way of keeping too much inside that happens a lot, because that can stop learning, stop help, and make people feel left out. So the best path is a middle way: think about the chance of hurt, think about the chance of help, and then decide if you should speak all, some, or none of what you have learned. This even way keeps the good parts of sharing while lowering the chance of the bad parts.

english_query: the difference between a strong reason and a weak reason
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know why some ways of thinking are better than other ways of thinking when we want to know if something is true.

Person number two: I can tell you about that. When we want to know if a thing is true, we look for why it might be so. Some of these reasons are good and some of these reasons are not good.

Person number one: What makes a reason good?

Person number two: A good reason is one that rests on things we can see and know to be true for everyone. It stays true even if we change how we look at it. It is hard to say it is not true.

Person number one: What about a reason that is not good?

Person number two: A reason that is not good is one that rests on a feeling or a single thing that might not happen again. It is easy to find a way to show it is not true.

Person number one: So, if I say I think it will rain because I feel sad, is that a reason that is not good?

Person number two: Yes, that is a reason that is not good. Your feeling does not make the sky change. But if you say it will rain because the clouds are dark and the air is heavy, that is a good reason. The dark clouds are something we can all see and agree on.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
The first idea is that a person can do many good things. This means the person does things that help other people or make the world a better place. They do these things many times. This part is about what the person does in the world.

The second idea is what the person becomes because of these things. The person says that if you do these good things over and over, you will become a good person. This means that the things you do change who you are inside. It means that your heart and your mind become the kind of things that want to do good things all the time.

The third idea is the way these two things are joined together. The person thinks that doing good things is what makes you a good person. They think the things you do and who you are are the same thing.

When we look at if this thinking is good, we must ask many things. One way to look at it is to see if doing a thing makes you the kind of person who does that thing. If you do a good thing because you have to, does it make you good inside? Some might say no. They might say you are only good if you want to do the thing from your heart. But other people might say that if you do the good thing enough times, you will start to want to do it. This is a way to change yourself. The thinking is not clearly right or wrong. It is a way to look at how a person is made. It is a way to see if the things we do and our souls are the same.

Person number one: What makes a person feel good in a way that stays for a long time? I do not mean the quick feeling of eating something sweet or getting a new thing. I mean the deep feeling that stays in your heart even when things are hard.

Person number two: That is a big thing to talk about. Most people think that getting things or having fun for a short time is what makes them feel good. But that feeling goes away very fast. To feel good in a deep way, you must have things that do not go away when the sun goes down.

Person number one: What are those things? Is it having a lot of money?

Person number two: No, money is not it. Money can buy things, but it cannot buy the feeling in your soul. One thing that helps is being part of something bigger than yourself. This could be helping other people, or being part of a group that works for a good reason. When you do things that help the world or help other people, you feel a deep kind of good that stays with you.

Person number one: So, it is about helping others? Is there anything else?

Person number two: Yes. Another thing is to be the person you are meant to be. This means you know who you are and you live in a way that is the same as what you believe is right. When the things you do and your heart are the same, you feel a state where your mind is not loud or full of bad feelings, and that is very strong.

Person number one: Does this mean we must always do the right thing to be happy?

Person number two: It is not about being perfect. It is about trying to live in a way that makes sense to your heart. When you spend your time on things that matter, like love, and work, and helping, you find a way to be happy that does not go away when a small thing goes wrong.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
We look at things that happened in the past to guess what will happen in the future. This is how we live our lives. We see that the sun comes up every morning, so we think it will come up tomorrow. We see that fire is hot, so we think it will be hot next time we touch it. We use what we know from before to make a plan for what is coming.

The hard question is this. Can we ever be sure that what happened before will happen again? Just because something happened a very large number of times does not mean it must happen one more time. There might be a thing we do not see that changes everything. We are trying to use the past to see a part of the world that has not even happened yet. We are trying to see around a corner that is not there.

Some people say that this way of thinking is the only way to know anything. They think that the world works in a way that stays the same. They say that if we look at enough things from before, we can find the way the world works. They believe that the past gives us the way to see the future. To them, the past is a map that shows us where we are going.

Other people say this way of thinking is not good. They say that we cannot know for sure. They say that just because a thing has happened many times, it does not make it a law of the world. They worry that we are only seeing what we want to see. They think we might be wrong because we do not know all the things that could change. They say we must be careful because the next thing might be something we have never seen before.

english_query: You are hard to talk with, old teacher.
ugf_response: No, I ask you not to fight, but because I want to know how you think things should be run among us. When you run them, do you have any other end than to make the people better? Have we not said many times that this is the job of a leader? Yes, we have said so. If you will not answer for yourself, I must answer for you. But if this is what a good man should do for his city, let me remind you of the names of the great leaders you just mentioned, like the first leader, and the second leader, and the third leader, and the one after that, and ask if you still think they were good people in the city.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response: First, we listen to the first words that a person says and we try to keep those words in our mind or write them down. Then, we watch the next time that person or another person talks about those words and we look at the new words they use. Then, we put the first words and the new words next to each other and we see if the new words have the very same part, the very same line, and the very same what it says as the first words. Then, we notice if any part of the first words is missing, added, or changed into something that says a different thing. Then, we ask if the new words still say what is real or if they now say something that is not real. Then, we can tell that the person is changing what was really said when the new words do not be the very same as the first words in what they say or line. This means we have found a change in the story and we can point it out.

ugf_response: The place of the happy garden is kept away from the world where people live by big hills, or big bodies of water, or a very hot area that no one can go through; and so people who write about places do not say anything about it.

Since doing well must happen if they did the work, and they did not do well, they must not have done the work. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who has ten pieces of gold. If that person finds ten more pieces of gold, they feel a small bit of good feeling. But if that person loses ten pieces of gold, they feel a very big bit of bad feeling. Even though the size of the gold is the very same in both cases, the bad feeling from losing is much bigger than the good feeling from winning.

The hard question is why our minds work this way. Why do we feel the hurt of losing more than the good of getting something new? Why is the pain of losing more than the good of winning?

Some people might say this happens because of how we live in the world. They might say that if we lose something, it is harder to get it back. If we have something and it goes away, we are now in a worse place than we were before. Getting something new is good, but losing something we already have feels like a great fall. To stay safe, our minds make us feel a lot of fear when we might lose things. This fear helps us stay alive by making us take care of what we have.

Other people might say this is just how our brains are built. They might say that our brains are made to look for things that can hurt us. A thing that can hurt us is a thing we must fear. A thing that gives us something good is not a thing that can hurt us. Because our brains spend so much time looking for things that can hurt us, we feel the bad things much more in a deep way. The good things are nice, but they do not feel as big as the bad things because the bad things are what we must watch for to stay safe.

english_query: If the bridge is open, then traffic can cross the river. The bridge is closed. Therefore, traffic cannot cross the river. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the way over the water is open, then cars can go across. This tells us what happens when the way is open. It does not say what happens when the way is closed. Maybe there is a boat that takes the cars. Maybe there is a hole under the ground for cars. The first idea only gives one way for cars to cross. It does not say that the bridge is the only way. Next, we look at the second idea. It says the bridge is not open. This means the first part of the if idea is not true. But knowing the bridge is not open does not prove that cars cannot cross. Cars might still cross by other means. We can imagine a story where the bridge is closed, but a boat is running, so cars still cross. In that story, the first two ideas are true, but the last idea is not. Because we can imagine a case where the early ideas are true and the last idea is not, the last idea does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: If the road is icy, then driving is dangerous. The road is icy. Therefore, driving is dangerous. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.

The first part is the road having hard water. The second part is driving being not safe. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the road does have hard water on it. This fits the first part of our earlier tie. Since the first part is true, the second part must also be true. We can make a small story to check this. Suppose someone agrees that roads with hard water make driving not safe. Suppose they also see that the road has hard water. Would they say driving is safe? No, they would have to say it is not safe. There is no way to agree with the first two ideas and say the last one is wrong. So the last idea follows for sure from the first two. follows

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
We see a person who is looking for a feeling that stays inside for a long time, not just a quick laugh or a quick smile. The person sits in a room or walks in a place with trees and thinks about what makes the heart feel full in a way that does not fade when the next thing comes. The mind goes on and on, looking for a reason that can hold on when the fast things go away. The question asks us to look past the quick fun and to find a reason that can stay when the noise stops. It also asks why we think one thing can stay while another does not, and whether we can even know the true answer.

First, many people say that a strong love from a friend or a family member is the best way to feel that deep happy feeling. They point to the way a close hold or a kind word can stay in the mind long after the words are said, and they say that the feeling comes from the way we join with another person and feel that we are not alone.

Second, another group says that doing something good for another person can bring the deep feeling. They tell about a time when they helped a child or gave food to a stranger and felt a warm feeling that did not fade quickly. They think that the act of giving and seeing the other person smile makes a feeling that stays because it shows that we can make the world a little better.

Third, a third kind of answer comes from people who think that getting better at a thing that you can do or at the thing you try to get can be the place it comes from. They speak of a time when they learned to play a song on a thing that makes music or finished a big work at a job and felt a strong happy feeling about me that lasted. They say that the change we see in me and you, the way we become better at something, can be a strong place for long lasting happy feeling.

Next, another idea comes from those who feel that being part of a group or a big story can bring the deep feeling. They talk about being in a group that works together on a cause, or feeling part of a big story that is bigger than any one person. The sense that we belong to something larger can make a feeling that stays, because it ties the heart to many other hearts.

After that, a simple and quiet answer is given by some who say that sitting alone in a calm place, looking at the sky or listening to wind, can bring a soft, long lasting happy feeling. They point out that this feeling does not need any other thing, it just comes from being still and feeling the world around us.

Each of these answers is given because the person who says it has felt that way me or you, or has watched someone else feel that way. The love answer comes from the need to feel safe with others. The give‑away answer comes from the need to see that we can help. The getting‑better answer comes from the need to see that we can grow. The group answer comes from the need to feel we are part of a larger story. The quiet answer comes from the need to feel calm when all noise stops. All of these ideas try to point to a way that a feeling can stay long after the first smile has gone. The question stays open, and each person may pick the idea that fits best with the way they have lived and the way they see the world.

ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means for a group of people to live together in a good way. We want to find a way for everyone to follow the same ways of acting so that no one gets hurt and everyone can get what they need. To do this, we first look at what each person wants and what each person needs. We see that if one person takes everything, the other people will feel bad and have a hard time. Then, we must sit down together and talk about what is right for all. We try to find a way of living where the things we do help the most people. We ask what would happen if every person did the same thing all the time. If everyone did the same thing and it made life bad for everyone, then that way of acting is not good. We look for ways of acting that make life better for the whole group. Next, we must make sure that everyone can understand these ways of acting and that everyone agrees to follow them. We try to make these ways of acting so that they are the same for everyone, no matter who they are. We also make sure that there are ways to take care of things when someone does not follow the ways we agreed upon. Finally, we find that the best ways of acting are those that we all choose together because they help us all live well and stay safe.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
Imagine you are walking down a long road. You have a bag of money to buy things. You decide to buy a small thing. Now you have less money. Then you see a bigger thing. You think to yourself, I have already spent a lot of money on this trip, so I might as well buy this big thing too. This is a way of thinking that can hurt you.

Let us look at how this works step by step. First, you spend some money on a thing. This money is gone. You cannot get it back. It does not matter if you buy one thing or ten things, that money is now gone. Second, you look at how much you have already spent. You feel that because you have already spent a lot, the money you spent before is not important anymore. You think the money you spent before and the money you are about to spend are joined together.

But this is not true. The money you spent before is gone. It is in the past. When you decide whether to buy something new, you should only think about the money you have right now and whether the new thing is good for you. You should not think about the money you already let go of. If you buy the new thing only because you already spent money, you are making a choice that is not right. You are letting the past make a bad choice for your future. You are acting as if the money you spent before can change how you think about the money you have now. This is a way of thinking that is not right. To make a good choice, you must look at the money you have in your hand and nothing else.

english_query: why being sure about something does not make it right
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who says something with a very strong voice. They look at you with eyes that say they know everything. They do not have any feeling that they might be wrong in their heart. They feel that what they say is the only way the world can be. Because they feel this way, they think they are right. This is how many people act. They think that if they feel sure, then the thing they think must be true.

But here is the hard question. Does feeling sure about a thing make that thing true? Just because a person has no feeling that they are wrong, does it mean they have found the truth?

There are many ways to look at this. First, some people might say that feeling sure is a good way to find what is true. They think that if you think very hard and your mind feels very clear, you have found the right path. They believe that the feeling of being sure is a sign that you are right.

Second, other people think this is a bad way to think. They say that the human mind can be wrong in many ways. A person can feel very sure about something that is not true at all. A person can see things that are not there or believe things that are not real. If a person only looks for things that make them feel sure, they might miss the truth. They might only see what they want to see.

Think about a person who thinks the sun moves around the earth. For a long time, people felt very sure about this. They saw the sun go up and go down every day. Their eyes told them it was true. They felt no feeling that they were wrong. But they were wrong. The earth moves around the sun. Their feeling of being sure did not change what was actually happening in the sky.

So, we see that being sure is just a feeling inside a person. It is not a way to check if a thing is real. To find what is true, we cannot only look at how we feel. We must look at the world and see if what we think is the same as what is actually there.

english_query: It looks like the human soul, when not with the body, can move bodies to a new place. Because a body follows a spirit thing when it comes to moving to a new place, as was said before. But the soul not with the body is a spirit thing. So it can move outside bodies by its order.
ugf_response: There are some spirit things whose power is not fixed to certain bodies; such are the good spirit helpers who are by what they are free from a body; so many bodies may follow them in moving. But if the power to move of a spirit thing is by what it is fixed to move one certain body, that thing will not be able to move a body of a higher kind, but only one of a lower kind: so the movers of the lower sky cannot move the higher sky. So, since the soul is by what it is fixed to move the body of which it is the shape, it cannot by its power move any other body.

english_query: But does he do what he wants if he does what is bad? Why do you not answer?
ugf_response: Well, I think not.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
Imagine a time when two people are talking. One person says something. Later, the other person tells a different story about what was said. The words the second person uses are not the same as the words the first person used. This makes it hard to know what the true thing was.

The hard question is how we can know when someone is changing what was said. We want to know if the person is telling the truth or if they are making up a new story to make themselves look good or to make the other person look bad.

Some people might say that we can look at the person who is talking. They might look at the face and the eyes of the person. They think that if a person is lying, their face will show it. They think that a person who tells the truth will look calm and not move much.

Other people might say that we should look at what other people saw. If many people were there and they all heard the same thing, then we can be more sure of what was said. They think that if many people say the same thing, it is good to think that it is the true thing.

Some people might also look at how the story changes over time. If a person tells the same story many times, it might be true. But if the story changes every time they tell it, it might mean they are making it up as they go. They think that a story that stays the same has a good chance of being what really happened.

There is also the idea that we must look at why a person would want to change the words. If changing the words helps them get what they want or keeps them out of trouble, they might do it. People who think this way believe that we must look at the reason behind the words to find the truth.

english_query: Also, the old teacher who thinks well says nothing holds itself. But the tie is in the one; and we cannot say this is because they are the same, for then the tie would be in what god really is. So the tie, or mark, is not the same as the one in god.
ugf_response: The marks are said to be in what god really is, only by being the same; but in the ones they are there by being the same, not just in truth, but also in how we speak of them; like how a shape is in the thing it shapes. So the marks set and tell the ones different, but not what god really is.

english_query: "We've poured blood and silver into this hull..."
ugf_response: First, we look at the words. The speaker says blood and silver went into the body of the ship. Blood means life was lost or hurt happened. Silver means money was spent. So, the ship took life and money to make. Then, we think about why they say this. They want you to see the ship is not just wood. It is made of their pain and their savings. But someone might say this is just a story to get help. Maybe the ship is bad. Maybe they lie to make you feel sad. Even so, the words show a strong tie. The speaker gave much of themselves. So, the ship is very important to them. They want you to know it is special because of what they gave up. The ship holds their life and their money. It is not just a thing. It is a part of them. The speaker means the ship is very special because it took their life and money to build. They want you to see it is not just a boat but something they gave much for.

english_query: why being sure about something does not make it right
ugf_response:
Sometimes a person feels very sure about a thing. They feel a strong feeling inside that what they think is the truth. This feeling can be very great and can move them in a big way. It can make them feel as if they have seen the thing with their own eyes. However, feeling sure is not the same as being right.

To understand this, we must look at how we get what we think is true. We get our thoughts from what we see, what we hear, and what we have learned before. But our eyes and ears can do things that are not right. We can see things that are not there, or we can see things in a way that is not the way they really are. We can hear things that are not true, or we can hear only part of what someone said.

Another way we get our thoughts is from what we already believe. If we already have a strong way of looking at the world, we will only look for things that fit that way. If we see something that does not fit, we might ignore it or change it in our minds so that it fits. This is like wearing glasses that only let in certain colors. You think the whole world is that color, but it is only your glasses making it look that way.

Also, our brains like to make things simple. The world is very big and very hard to understand. It is easy to make a guess that makes sense and feels good. When we make a guess that feels good, our brain gives us a good feeling. This feeling of being sure is often just our brain being happy that it found a simple answer. It is not a sign that the answer is the truth.

So, we must remember that a strong feeling inside does not change the truth of the world. A thing can be wrong even if every person in the room feels sure it is right. To find the truth, we should not look at how we feel. Instead, we must look at what we can see and what we can show to be true, and we must always be ready to change our minds when we find something new.

english_query: It seems that the mind gets what is not cut up before what is cut up. For the old teacher says that we know from the first parts and small bits. But first parts are not cut up, and small bits are of things that are cut up. So we know what is not cut up before what is cut up.
ugf_response: When we get to know things, the first parts and small bits are not always known first: for sometimes we go from things we see to know the first parts and the causes we can think about. But when our knowing is full, knowing the things that come from causes always needs knowing the first parts and small bits: for as the old teacher says, we think we know when we can show how the first parts come from their causes.

english_query: Either the answer is yes or the answer is no. The answer is yes. Therefore, the answer is not no. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first bit of writing. It says the answer is yes or the answer is no. Then, the second bit of writing says the answer is yes. If the answer is yes, it cannot be no. So the last bit of writing, which says the answer is not no, follows for sure. follows

english_query: The miners in Group A and Group B chose opposite plans even though the two sets of plans describe the same outcomes. What aspect of the presentation caused the reversal?
ugf_response: First, we look at the people who work deep in the ground. One group saw a plan that talked about saving lives. The other group saw a plan that talked about people not living. The numbers were the same. The chance of six people staying alive was the same as the chance of six people not dying. But the groups made different choices. The first group liked the sure thing. The second group took a chance. This happens because our minds feel words about losing things in a hard way. When we think about keeping something good, we want to be safe. We do not want to lose what we have. But when we think about losing something, we get scared. We might take a big chance to avoid the bad thing. We hope for a lucky break. The words save make us feel good about keeping what we have. The words die make us feel bad. This feeling changes how we pick our path. Someone might say the plans are the same, so the choice should be the same. But humans are not counting machines. We are driven by feelings. The way the choice is painted in our head matters. It shows that how we say things changes what people do. So the problem is not the counting. The problem is the picture the words paint. The change in choice happened because the plans were shown as keeping good things or losing bad things, which changed how the people felt about taking chances.

english_query: why counting up good and bad results is harder than it sounds
ugf_response: First, we notice that when you try to add up the good things and the bad things you have to look at each thing that happens. Then we see that many of those things are not together but make each other change, so you cannot just count them one by one without thinking about the way they are together. This means you have to keep track of the chance that one thing will cause another good or bad thing, and that chance can be small or big. Next, we see that the way you count can be moved one way by the way you think about the good things, so you might count more of them than the bad ones even if they are the same. This makes you need a way to keep the count even and not let your own move change it. Then we note that the numbers you get can be big and the small ones can get lost, so you have to be careful not to miss a little bad thing or a little good thing. This also means you have to use a way to write down each count so you do not forget any. Finally, we see that all of these parts make the simple act of adding good and bad things a hard job that needs a lot of thought and care.

english_query: If the seed gets water, then the seed grows. The seed gets water. Therefore, the seed grows. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the small thing gets water, then the small thing gets bigger. This sets up a clear path from water to getting bigger. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the small thing does get water. Since the first part of the if-then idea is true, the second part must also be true. So, the small thing getting bigger is the right thing to say. The last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: As the dogs get help from the way the person who goes after wild things works, and the big animals get help from the way the person who watches them works, and all other things are looked after so they do well and not so they get hurt?
ugf_response: For sure, not so they get hurt.

english_query: the problem with thinking you know more than you really do
ugf_response:
The first idea is that people often think they know more than they actually do. This is a thing that happens to many people. The second idea is that this way of thinking is bad because it leads to doing things that are wrong. The third idea is that when we think we know everything, we stop looking for what is true and stop learning new things.

The person says that the first idea is a thing that is true. It is a fact that people can be wrong about what they know. The person thinks that the second idea follows from the first idea. They think that if people think they know too much, they will make bad choices and do things that are not good. The person thinks that the third idea also follows from the first idea. They think that thinking we know everything stops us from getting better.

We must look at if the thinking is good. The person is right that people can think they know more than they do. This is a thing that is true. The person is also right that this can lead to doing things that are wrong. However, the thinking has a small problem. The person does not tell us how we can know if we know too much. They do not tell us how to find the truth if we are already wrong. While the person is right about the bad thing that can happen, they do not give us a way to fix it. So, the thinking is mostly good but it is not all there.

english_query: During the harvest season, the player, a newly appointed village elder, must decide how to allocate the upcoming grain bounty. The village council presents two pairs of allocation plans, each involving uncertain weather outcomes.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first pair of plans. In both of these, the plan for good sky gives the most food, so a person who thinks well would pick that one to help the most people. Then we look at the second pair. In both of these, the plan for bad sky saves more lives if things go wrong, so a person who thinks well would pick that one to keep people safe. But here is the trouble. The good sky plan in the first pair is the same as the good sky plan in the second pair. And the bad sky plan in the first pair is the same as the bad sky plan in the second pair. So, if you pick the top choice in the first group, you are picking the same thing as the bottom choice in the second group. This means you cannot think well in both groups at the same time. You have to choose what matters more: hoping for the best or being safe from the worst. There is no single answer that wins in every way because the two groups push you in the other direction. The player faces a choice between trying to get the most good or trying to stop the most bad. Since the plans are the same, the player must decide if they care more about the best possible end or the safest possible end, and stick to that choice.
